titles.title: He will give the weary strength

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Those who hope in the Lord will renew their strength They will run and not grow weary, they will walk and not be faint And like a flight upon an eagle's wings, He will give the weary strength

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So lift your eyes up to the sky To the one who hears you when you cry

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Those who hope in the Lord will renew their strength They will run and not grow weary, they will walk and not be faint Like a flight upon an eagle's wings, He will give, He will give He will give the weary strength
